message:
chore: update Cargo.lock dependencies and sync beads issue tracker state

Cargo.lock updated to reflect asupersync switching from path dep to pinned git
rev (08dd31df), adding a second asupersync entry for the git source alongside
the local workspace entry. Beads issue tracker JSONL synced with latest
project state including new issues for archive reconciliation and semantic
readiness features.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
